final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 grid poster design for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book), optimized for 3:4 vertical format with clear grid boundaries for easy slicing into 9 individual posts.

Style/medium: Clean, premium editorial design with ins-style aesthetic, soft cream and beige color palette, gentle healing mood, light skeuomorphic illustrations, magazine-quality typography
Composition: 3-column × 3-row grid layout with visible spacing/borders between cells, each cell centered and self-contained, no text overlapping grid lines, 3:4 vertical aspect ratio
Subject: Sleep wellness content for female lifestyle audience, featuring soft bedding, moon, stars, pillows, eye masks, warm milk, aromatherapy, books, curtains, bedside lamps
Scene/backdrop: Cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, soft caramel tones with dark brown text, warm and soothing atmosphere
Lighting/mood: Soft diffused warm lighting, cozy bedtime ambiance, gentle and calming
Color palette: Cream white base, light beige and oatmeal mid-tones, soft caramel accents, dark brown for text only
Materials/textures: Soft fabric textures, smooth paper-like surfaces, subtle grain for warmth
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", "3. 房间温度别太高", "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", "7. 固定上床时间", "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: Must be a standard 9-grid layout with clear dividers for easy cutting into 9 separate images; each cell must work as standalone Xiaohongshu post; all text in Chinese only; large readable typography; comfortable white space; professional new media design aesthetic
Avoid: Cheap marketing vibes, excessive decorations, cluttered layouts, text too close to grid lines, English text, garbled characters, low-quality stock aesthetics, neon colors, harsh contrasts
